nasb.text: When a righteous man turns away from his righteousness, commits iniquity and dies because of it, for his iniquity which he has committed he will die.

esv.text: When a righteous person turns away from his righteousness and does injustice, he shall die for it; for the injustice that he has done he shall die.

cnv.text: 義人若轉離他的義去行惡，他就必因此滅亡；他必因著他所行的不義滅亡。

ccb.text: 倘若义人离义行恶，他必因犯罪而死。
